message:
test(output): add DenialBox branch context unit tests

7 new unit tests for the branch_name and is_protected_branch fields
added to DenialBox: plain render without context, with branch name,
with protected branch, ASCII render, Unicode render, all-fields combo,
and builder chaining. Covers all render paths (plain, ASCII, Unicode).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
